rulings.Case Title: JOANNE REINHART VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 23, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA ALTERNATIVE LOAN TRUST 2004-4, RECONTRUST COMPANY , N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.s' AMENDED DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend, causes of action: 1) Declaratory Relief to allege acutal controversy, non duplicative of other causes of action and in conformity with Gomes and Frazier; 3) Breach of Implied Covenant to allege contract and specific provisions breached; 4, 5 & 6) To plead fraud with specificity; 10) Violation CC 1788.17 to show fact that Bank of America is "debt collector;" 12) Cancellation instruments to allege theory of relief in conformity with DeBrunner and CCC 2934a(b). Plaintiff's counsel to comply with CRC 3.1110(c); 3.1113(f) in the future. = (501/REQ)

Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 23, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTs RALPH DAYAN, 1090 EDDY ST. LLC, ADAM KOMOSA, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA JASON ADAMS and TOM SWIERK's DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. 1) Sutain with leave to amend to reomve class to meet typicality. 2) Sustain with leave to amend re eighth cause of action. IIED needs to show severe emotional distress. = (501/REQ)

Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 23, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTs RALPH DAYAN, 1090 EDDY ST. LLC, ADAM KOMOSA, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA JASON ADAMS and TOM SWIERK's MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. 1) Moot as to class representation in view of ruling in demurrer and paragraphs 102 and 109. 2) Deny re punitive damages, sufficient as to several causes of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. TAMARA HINES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorney Fees Against Tamara Hines As An Element Of Costs; Memo Of P & A And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 23, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's Motion Attorney Fees Against Tamara Hines As An Element Of Costs. Grant, motion for attorney fees and costs. Hearing required re amount. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK JOHNSON VS. GABRIELLE GOFFINET et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 23, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT GABRIELLE GOFFINET's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustian with leave to amend to allege how advice re Rent Board given, i.e, attached 3/29/11 letter. = (501/REQ)
